title: Request for Attachment and Link Configuration Features in File Column Settings for public permission
excerpt: Kindly permit us to append documents from the File Column to emails! Alternatively, if direct file attachments are not feasible, kindly enable the generation of public links! Why is it impossible to configure Public/Priv…

posts.author: sangwoolee82 (Sangwoo Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: Kindly permit us to append documents from the File Column to emails! Alternatively, if direct file attachments are not feasible, kindly enable the generation of public links! Why is it impossible to configure Public/Private links within the specific Column’s Settings?
